new_value: Fixed in beads commit bf2b66c8: DOLT_COMMIT nothing-to-commit error was silently swallowed, leaving SQL transaction uncommitted. InnoDB (dolt_ignored) wisp inserts were rolled back when connection returned to pool. Fix: call sqlTx.Commit() explicitly when DOLT_COMMIT finds nothing to version but SQL changes may exist.
